hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Leave the Office Early Day, let's celebrate with a film that's all about breaking free and having a good time, just like the characters in Hairspray who dance their way to success.
hero.blurb: Hairspray is a fun, energetic film that's full of great music and dance numbers. With its positive messages about inclusivity and self-acceptance, it's a great choice for a day when you want to leave your worries behind and have a good time.

released.title: Knocked Up
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this hilarious and heartwarming film has become a classic romantic comedy. Released today in 2007, Knocked Up still rules as a relatable and entertaining movie about unexpected love and growing up.
released.blurb: Knocked Up is a funny and touching film that explores the ups and downs of relationships and parenthood. With its well-developed characters and realistic dialogue, it's a great choice for anyone looking for a romantic comedy with substance.

birthday.title: More American Graffiti
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Dennis Hopper, born June 2, 1936, who stars in this classic coming-of-age film. Happy birthday to Dennis Hopper, this film showcases his talent as a director and features him in a memorable role.
birthday.blurb: More American Graffiti is a nostalgic and engaging film that explores the lives of a group of friends in the 1960s. With its talented cast and nostalgic soundtrack, it's a great choice for anyone looking for a classic coming-of-age story.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This notoriously bad action film has become a cult classic for its over-the-top action sequences and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a funny and entertaining watch for fans of so-bad-it's-good movies.
awful.blurb: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is a hilariously bad film that's full of ridiculous action sequences and cheesy one-liners. With its low production values and poor acting, it's a great choice for anyone looking for a laughably bad movie experience.
